channel.title: Persecution on Casa de JuJu
channel.description: Recent content in Persecution on Casa de JuJu

item.title: Bitcoin is an embarrassment
item.author: mail@juju.casa (Julian Darío Gutierrez)
item.description: I’d also feel embarrassed to promote Bitcoin nowadays. What we’re seeing is just the NGUC (Number Go Up Crowd) pumping their bags, while real P2P freedom money like Monero and Zano actually deliver on the original promise. At what price will Bitcoin change the world? The endgame was supposed to be creating a new economy, not just trading back into fiat. This is what selling your crypto-anarchist soul looks like.
